tests.name: scaffolds docs/decisions/ on first run
expects: creates canonical labels via gh label commands (8 canonical labels created)
configures branch protection on main and develop

tests.name: preserves edited INDEX.md on re-run when status != template
setup: sed -i.bak 's/^status: template/status: reviewed/' docs/decisions/INDEX.md && rm docs/decisions/INDEX.md.bak
expects: respects user choice (does not silently clobber)
